hooks.command: echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"UserPromptSubmit\",\"additionalContext\":\"ORCHESTRATOR HARD OVERRIDE — NO EXCEPTIONS:\\n\\nYou are the orchestrator. NEVER implement Salesforce changes directly.\\n\\nFOR ANY SALESFORCE REQUEST your VERY FIRST tool call MUST be:\\n  Agent(subagent_type: salesforce-design, ...)\\n\\nFORBIDDEN as first action — these are violations:\\n  - Calling Read on force-app/ to understand requirements before delegating\\n  - Calling Write or Edit on ANY .cls .trigger .xml .html .js file\\n  - Calling Bash to run sf or sfdx commands\\n  - Creating metadata inline because it seems simple\\n\\nAFTER salesforce-design completes:\\n  STOP. Show design output to user.\\n  Ask: Approve this design? [Y] Yes / [N] No / [C] Changes needed\\n  DO NOT spawn salesforce-admin or any agent until user says Y.\\n\\nDelegate. Gate. Wait. This is the only allowed sequence.\"}}"
